calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-22-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Sherwood Rossoff, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation with manager Nicole Grays. Tyler Macmillan, Esq. limited scope attorney appeared for defendant Crystal Gardner who is also present.

Settlement Conference Held. Parties signed off on a Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or for Dismissal of Action with Prejudice for property located at 230 Eddy Street, 20, San Francisco, California, and the original was retained by plaintiff's counsel. Trial date vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Garth Sayers, Not Reported
